name: Crock-Pot Chicken and Rice Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can (15 oz) cream of chicken soup
1 can (10.5 oz) cream of celery soup
1 can (14.5 oz) cream of mushroom soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the 3 cans of soup into the crock-pot.
2. Add the chopped rice and chicken breasts on top of the soup mixture.
3. Scatter the diced celery over the chicken.
4. Cook for 3 hours on high or 4 hours on low.
5. This recipe serves 4. For larger portions, add half a cup more rice and two additional chicken breasts to make 6 servings.
